query:
SELECT m.map_id,
               m.last_checkpoint_seq,
               COALESCE(MAX(e.seq), 0) AS "latest_seq!"
        FROM maps m
        LEFT JOIN map_events e ON e.map_id = m.map_id
        GROUP BY m.map_id, m.last_checkpoint_seq
        HAVING COALESCE(MAX(e.seq), 0) > m.last_checkpoint_seq
